style.rationale: ui-ux-pro-max: Portfolio/Personal → Motion-Driven + Minimalism. Dark Mode (OLED) provides WCAG AAA contrast, low emission, perfect for developer portfolios. Exaggerated Minimalism reserved for hero typography only.

palette.source: ui-ux-pro-max colors.csv → Portfolio/Personal (inverted for dark mode)

typography.rationale: Both are geometric sans-serifs optimized for screens. Geist (by Vercel) gives a sharp, technical identity for headings; Inter handles body copy with superior legibility at small sizes.

layout.pattern: Single-page scroll with 4 anchored sections, sticky top nav
layout.hero: Centered, oversized name (Exaggerated Minimalism touch), title below, two CTAs (primary blue + ghost)
layout.about: Two-column on md+: bio paragraph left, skill chips / quick facts right
layout.projects: 2x2 grid on md+, single column mobile. shadcn Card with border hover accent
layout.contact: Centered email + 3 social icon buttons (GitHub, LinkedIn, Email)
layout.footer: Single line: © 2026 Toan Ho · Built with Next.js

motion.scrollReveal: fade-up on section enter (CSS only — @media prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)

icons.rationale: No emojis as UI icons per ui-ux-pro-max rule
